capability_declaration.evidence: Part 7-4 Logical Nodes and SCL data models
capability_declaration.rationale: Provides structured capability modeling via logical nodes that statically define device functions/measurement points enabling discovery of available DER control interfaces.

bounded_authority.evidence: None; relies on external security extensions (IEC 62351)
bounded_authority.rationale: Base protocol lacks agent-specific scope boundaries, expiry mechanisms, or revocation chains, though MMS read/write permissions offer basic access controls that cannot be inferred as bounded authority.

decision_auditability.evidence: Part 7-3 reporting control and LLN0 log objects
decision_auditability.rationale: Built-in event logging and reporting capture executed commands/states for post-hoc audits but do not mandate structured reasoning traces or explicit decision attribution required by autonomous agents.

data_governance.rationale: As a fieldbus/substation communication architecture standard it defines transport and data models but contains no clauses addressing proprietary ownership, consent workflows, or retention policies.
